productDisplayName: Wrangler Women Sunrise Navy Blue T-shirt
description: Composition Blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the chest Fit Regular Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron; do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery With a clean cut and a neat finish that offers a flattering silhouette, this T-shirt from wrangler offers a casual yet stylish vibe. The soft cotton fabric combined with the graphic print together make it a to-die-for buy. Pair it with jeans, shorts or a skirt and sporty footwear for absolute style.
